Look at rock—hard, cold.<[silence:60ms]> Look at leaf—soft, bendy.<[silence:60ms]> Rock not leaf, leaf not rock.<[silence:60ms]> This is different.<[silence:60ms]>
When two things not same touch, not same smell, not same taste—this different.<[silence:60ms]>
You see fire burn bright, water wet and slip—fire not water, water not fire.<[silence:60ms]> That different.<[silence:60ms]> If thing not like other thing, it different.<[silence:60ms]> Simple.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you different.

Look at rock—hard, cold. Look at leaf—soft, bendy. Rock not leaf, leaf not rock. This is different.
When two things not same touch, not same smell, not same taste—this different.
You see fire burn bright, water wet and slip—fire not water, water not fire. That different. If thing not like other thing, it different. Simple.
